sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78947" key="paratragw|de/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρατρᾰγῳδ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n78947.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use mock-tragic style</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.92</biblScope> </bibl> ; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ut paratragoedat carnufex</tr_>! <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Pseud.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">707</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
